use tokio::time::{timeout, sleep, Duration};

async fn call_upstream() -> Result<String, &'static str> {
    Err("transient failure")
}

async fn process_with_retries() -> Result<String, &'static str> {
    for attempt in 0..5 {
        // BAD: timeout future created per retry iteration
        let result = timeout(Duration::from_secs(2), call_upstream()).await;
        match result {
            Ok(Ok(val)) => return Ok(val),
            Ok(Err(_)) | Err(_) => {
                sleep(Duration::from_millis(100 * (attempt + 1))).await;
            }
        }
    }
    Err("exhausted retries")
}
